zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond於1419年出生在愛爾蘭蒙斯特時，他的父親James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond39歲，母親Mary de Burke of Clanicarde29歲。他於1445年8月22日與Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry在愛爾蘭庫迪 盧斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1468年2月15日在愛爾蘭庫迪 盧斯德洛達享年49歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 度布林度布林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond于1419年出生在爱尔兰蒙斯特时，他的父亲James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond39岁，母亲Mary de Burke of Clanicarde29岁。他于1445年8月22日与Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry在爱尔兰庫迪 盧斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1468年2月15日在爱尔兰庫迪 盧斯德洛達享年49岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 度布林度布林。

nameMeanings.name: FitzGerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond was born in 1419, in Munster, Ireland, his father, James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond, was 39 and his mother, Mary de Burke of Clanicarde, was 29. He married Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry on 22 August 1445, in County Louth, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 15 February 1468, in Drogheda, County Louth, Ireland, at the age of 49, and was buried in Dublin, County Dublin, Ireland.

fr.Drogheda, IIreland: County of the Town of Drogheda, Irlande
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond est né en 1419, à Munster, Irlande, son père, James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Mary de Burke of Clanicarde, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry le 22 août 1445, à County Louth, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 15 février 1468, à Drogheda, County Louth, Irlande, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Dublin, County Dublin, Irlande.

de.Drogheda, IIreland: County of the Town of Drogheda, Irland
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond 1419 in Munster, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond 39 und seine Mutter Mary de Burke of Clanicarde 29. Er hat am 22. August 1445 in County Louth, Irland Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Februar 1468 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Drogheda, County Louth, Irland und wurde in Dublin, County Dublin, Irland begraben.

it.Drogheda, IIreland: County of the Town of Drogheda, Irlanda
it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond è nato il nel 1419 nel Munster, Irlanda, il suo padre, James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Mary de Burke of Clanicarde, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry il 22 agosto 1445, nel County Louth, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 15 febbraio 1468, nel Drogheda, County Louth, Irlanda, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmondが1419年にアイルランドムンスターで生まれた時，父James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmondは39歳，母Mary de Burke of Clanicardeは29歳であった。1445年8月22日にアイルランドコウントイ ロウスでBaroness of Desmond Ellice de Barryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1468年2月15日にアイルランドコウントイ ロウスドログヘダで49歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ ダブリンダブリンにて埋葬された。

ko.Drogheda, IIreland: 아일랜드 카운티 프 테 타운 프 드로게이다
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond(이)가 1419년 아일랜드 먼스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary de Burke of Clanicarde(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1445년 8월 22일 아일랜드 카운티 루스에서 Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1468년 2월 15일 아일랜드 카운티 루스 드로게이다에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 드블린 드블린에 묻혔다.

pt.Drogheda, IIreland: County of the Town of Drogheda, Irlanda
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond nasceu em 1419, em Munster, Irlanda, seu pai, James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Mary de Burke of Clanicarde, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry em 22 de agosto de 1445, em County Louth, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de fevereiro de 1468, em Drogheda, County Louth, Irlanda, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda.

ro.Drogheda, IIreland: County of the Town of Drogheda, Irlanda

ru.Drogheda, IIreland: коунти оф т тоун оф дрогеда, Ирландия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond родился в 1419 г. в местности мунстир, Ирландия, его отцу по имени James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary de Burke of Clanicarde, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry 22 августа 1445 г. в местности коунти лоут, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 15 февраля 1468 г. в местности дрогеда, коунти лоут, Ирландия в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности дублинь, коунти дублинь, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond nació en 1419, en Munster, Irlanda, su papá, James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Mary de Burke of Clanicarde, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry el 22 de agosto de 1445, en County Louth, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 15 de febrero de 1468, en Drogheda, County Louth, Irlanda, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda.
